[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011 2
1 0110000 2
2 0010111 4
3 1110110 5
4 0001110 3
5 0100000 1
6 0100011 3
7 0000011 2

34 43 0000000 a

67 76 0000110 2
70 07 0000000 a
